release_notes: Probe wrapper switched from cmd.exe to PowerShell -WindowStyle Hidden. The cmd.exe /c version captured chrome stdio reliably but spawned VISIBLE consoles flashing chrome's verbose log on the desktop — windowsHide:true doesn't suppress cmd.exe when the parent is a GUI subsystem app. PS Start-Process -RedirectStandardOutput / -RedirectStandardError keeps the capture; no console flash. Also dropped --enable-logging=stderr — proved chrome starts, don't need its log spam anymore.
